headline: Harbor Group International Sells New Jersey Multifamily Community
summary: Affiliates of Harbor Group International, LLC ("HGI"), a leading global real estate investment and management firm, today announced the sale of Grove at Somerset, a 384-unit multifamily community in Somerset, New Jersey. CBRE facilitated the off-market transaction.
